name: Data Pipeline Architect
description: Design batch, streaming, and hybrid data platforms with explicit contracts, failure handling, replay strategy, and migration paths. Use when Porter needs end-to-end pipeline topology, ingestion/CDC/event architecture, orchestration patterns, freshness-vs-cost tradeoffs, platform standards, or decision-ready blueprints for reliable data movement.
not_for: implementing a specific ETL or ELT job as the main task
generic infrastructure design with no core dataflow decision
recommending streaming platforms without a justified latency need
